admin.page.title: JellyUX Homepage
admin.general.title: General
admin.general.enable.label: Enable JellyUX Homepage
admin.general.enable.help: Show JellyUX widgets on the home screen. Disable to revert to the native Jellyfin home screen.
admin.apikeys.title: API Keys
admin.apikeys.tmdb.label: TMDb API Key
admin.apikeys.tmdb.help: Required for Connected widgets that use The Movie Database. Leave empty if not needed. Accepted formats: 32-character hexadecimal key (v3), or v4 bearer token starting with "ey".
admin.apikeys.tmdb.error: Invalid TMDb key format. Expected: 32 hexadecimal characters, a v4 bearer token, or leave empty.
admin.cache.title: Cache
admin.cache.sessionttl.label: Session cache TTL (minutes)
admin.cache.sessionttl.help: How long the home screen widget layout is cached per user. Reduce to see configuration changes more quickly; increase to lower server load.
admin.cache.tmdbrefresh.label: TMDb refresh interval (hours)
admin.cache.tmdbrefresh.help: How often TMDb data is refreshed. Increase to reduce external API calls; decrease for fresher content.
admin.tmdbcache.title: TMDb Cache
admin.tmdbcache.help: Status of the cached TMDb data used by Connected widgets.
admin.tmdbcache.pageshint: Each page is about 20 items from TMDb, so "Pages: 3" fetches roughly 60 items for that list.
admin.widgets.title: Widgets
admin.widgets.help: Use the arrows to change the display order. Changes take effect after saving.
admin.addsection.title: Add a section
admin.addsection.type.label: Section type
admin.addsection.error: Please choose a section type before adding.
admin.value.label: Value
admin.value.error: A value is required for this section.
admin.personalized.note: Section names are generated per user (e.g. "Because you watched ...").
admin.name.label: Display name
admin.name.help: Leave empty to use the default name.
admin.discover.genre.label: Genre
admin.discover.sortby.label: Sort by
admin.discover.sortby.title: Title
admin.rewards.help: At least one of Ceremony or Category is required. Data comes from Wikidata and may not cover every ceremony/year. For better search results, type the full name (e.g. "Academy Award for Best Picture" rather than "Academy").
admin.minitems.label: Min items
admin.minitems.help: Section hidden if below this count.
admin.maxitems.label: Max items
admin.viewmode.label: View mode
admin.excludewatched.label: Exclude already watched
admin.excludewatched.help: When enabled, titles the user has already watched are not recommended.
admin.byw.scope.label: Scope
admin.byw.scope.help: Restricts which recently watched titles can trigger this section.
admin.tmdbregion.label: Region
admin.tmdbrefresh.inprogress: Refresh started, this may take a few seconds...
admin.tmdbrefresh.failed: Failed to trigger refresh. See browser console for details.
